response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack software engineer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, but he fundamentally lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows required for this role. While he has some relevant financial domain exposure through RIDE Capital, his professional C++ experience is limited to a brief six-month stint in 2014-2015, making him a poor fit for a senior C++ position in capital markets.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (10+ years) across various stacks, architectures, and open-source projects.
Prior exposure to the financial and investment domain through his tenure at RIDE Capital.
Strong background in modern development practices including CI/CD pipelines, TDD, and microservices.
concerns: Fails to meet the mandatory requirement of 5–10 years of C++ experience, with only 6 months of professional C/C++ work from 2014-2015.
Lacks demonstrated experience with Windows platform development, as his background leans heavily toward web technologies and Linux.
Missing deep enterprise SQL Server or Oracle expertise, primarily utilizing MongoDB and MySQL in his recent roles.
